name: com.fallingtreerisk/mcp
title: Falling Tree Risk
description: Falling tree risk intelligence API for any US property. Returns risk level, annual probability range, storm history, canopy density, tree health trend, roofline canopy overhang, and soil uprooting risk.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Your Falling Tree Risk API key. Get one at https://www.fallingtreerisk.com/api-access
